levels.descriptor: No clear thesis or structure; ideas presented out of order.
Thesis present but supporting points are thin or poorly ordered.
Clear thesis with organized supporting points; minor gaps.
Clear thesis, logically ordered support, and a conclusion that ties back to the opening.

anchors.example_span: I opened by asking you to imagine your first day at a new job — and everything I've said since then has been about designing that exact experience.
anchors.rationale: Explicit callback to the opening hook demonstrates the speech was built around a single thesis, not a list of disconnected points.

anchors.example_span: So that's point one. Point two is kind of related but also different, it's about costs.
anchors.rationale: Points are enumerated but the connective logic between them is vague ('kind of related'), signaling weak organization.

levels.descriptor: Monotone, erratic pacing, or fillers that disrupt comprehension.
Noticeable pacing/filler/volume issues in multiple sections.
Steady pacing and volume with isolated lapses.
Varied pacing, consistent volume, and minimal fillers throughout.

anchors.example_span: Pitch variance of 42Hz with volume consistency 0.91 across the full 4:50 runtime
anchors.rationale: High pitch variance plus high volume consistency indicates deliberate vocal emphasis rather than monotone or erratic delivery.

anchors.example_span: Pitch variance of 8Hz across the full runtime with 14 filler words in the closing minute
anchors.rationale: Very low pitch variance signals monotone delivery, compounded by filler density right when the speech should be landing its close.

levels.descriptor: No direct address to the audience; purely read from notes.
Occasional rhetorical questions or direct address.
Regular direct address and rhetorical devices that invite the audience in.
Sustained, natural engagement — direct address, rhetorical questions, and callbacks woven throughout.

anchors.example_span: How many of you have felt that exact frustration? Keep that feeling in mind, because by the end of this you'll have a way to fix it.
anchors.rationale: Direct question plus an explicit promise to the audience creates sustained engagement, not a one-off rhetorical flourish.

anchors.example_span: The data shows that seventy-three percent of respondents indicated a preference for the second option.
anchors.rationale: Third-person, report-style phrasing with no direct address to the listener.

levels.descriptor: Far over or under the time limit (>20% deviation).
Noticeably over or under time (10-20% deviation).
Within the time limit with a natural, unhurried close.

anchors.example_span: Presentation duration 4:55 against a 5:00 limit, ending on a complete closing line
anchors.rationale: Finished within limit with a deliberate, complete close rather than a rushed cutoff.

anchors.example_span: Presentation duration 3:20 against a 5:00 limit, ending abruptly after the second point
anchors.rationale: Well under time with no conclusion — the speech was cut short, not economically delivered.
